titleStmt.title: SII 42.307: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 307. (A.R. No. 76 of 1956-57.) Chiṭṭivalasa, Visakhapatnam Taluk, Visakhapatnam District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone kept in the Travellers' Bungalow.
Dated year 11, uttarāyaṇa Sankrānti (Written in Telugu-Kannaḍa characters of 11th-12th century A.D.).

Records the gift of two puṭṭis of cultivable land for food offerings to god Gōkarṇa-Rājanarāyaṇēśvara-mahādēva of Guḍivāḍa, by Kommana, with the consent of Jaddepa-nāyaka, (son of) Chāmi-nāyaka, the holder of a vṛitti in the temple. (Cf. 308 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samaramukhānē
ka ripuda¨rppama¨rddana bhujaba
laparākrama paramamāhēśvara para
ma bhaṭṭāraka mahārājādhirāja rā
ja paramēśvara gaṁggānvayāvalaṁba
na staṁbha śrīmadanaṁttava¨rmmadēvara pra
vaddha(¨rddha)māna vijayarājya saṁvatsaraṁ
bulu 11 . śrāhi [Utta]rāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtta(tti) kā
lamuna guṟivāṟa(guḍivāḍa) gōka¨rnna(¨rṇna) rājanārāya
ṇēśvara mahādēvara [ niṁḷāla] vrittikāṟai(ḍai)
na cāmināyaka jaddepanāyakula sammō
damutō rājanārāyaṇa samaka (mukha)muna vāruṇa
śāla cēmapaṟu kommana nivēdyamunaku
viṟicina Iruviṭṭi paṇḍa(ṇṭa)bhūmi yi
garu(gāru) paṁḍamanā guṟiyuttarada
kṣa(kṣi)ṇa pūrvapacci(ści)maṁlō nāluṟiti
ki naṟuminaṁdavōnalōni maddhamā(¨rmmā)
naku dīpamunaku rājulaku śrīṁbū
jārādhanagā niccitimi dānilō gulā
Digital edition of SII 42.307 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
